headline: Weyerhaeuser Co (WY) Stock Outlook: What Happened in Q1?
summary: Weyerhaeuser Co (NYSE:WY) is one of the best land and timber stocks to buy now. The Street expects Weyerhaeuser stock to jump more than 26% from its current level. Weyerhaeuser Co (NYSE:WY) reported its Q1 2026 results on April 30. The company delivered $1.73 billion in net sales and $77 million in adjusted net earnings, […]
